meaning: n.鍘熺墿,鍘熷瀷,鍘熶汉(鎸囦汉绫荤殑濮嬬),[鐢焆鍘熺敓璐ㄤ綋
examples: Temperature remarkably affected the frequency and the speed of protoplast fusion.
It provides scientific basis for the breeding of protoplast fusion of killer yeast.
This is the first report of plant regeneration from the protoplast culture of an indica rice.
